sources.name: SEC EDGAR: Lumentum Fiscal 2026 Q3 Form 10-Q

metrics.label: Revenue
metrics.sourceText: Revenue was $808.4 million for the three months ended March 28, 2026.

metrics.label: Cloud & Networking components revenue
metrics.sourceText: Cloud & Networking components revenue was $533.3 million.

metrics.label: Cloud & Networking systems revenue
metrics.sourceText: Cloud & Networking systems revenue was $275.1 million.

productCategoryMetrics.sourceText: Cloud & Networking components revenue was $533.3 million.
productCategoryMetrics.notes: Broad product group; the report does not split CW laser, EML/DFB, wafer or other component revenue.

productCategoryMetrics.sourceText: Cloud & Networking systems revenue was $275.1 million.
productCategoryMetrics.notes: Broad systems/transceiver product group; the report does not identify the revenue as silicon photonic pluggable modules.

companyProductCoverage.evidenceText: The company reports Cloud & Networking components, including optical components and laser-related product lines.
companyProductCoverage.notes: Recorded as capability/product coverage; no output edge generated.

companyProductCoverage.evidenceText: Cloud & Networking components include laser-related optical components sold into cloud and networking markets.
companyProductCoverage.notes: The report does not disclose standalone CW laser revenue.

companyProductCoverage.evidenceText: Cloud & Networking components include laser-related optical components sold into cloud and networking markets.
companyProductCoverage.notes: The report does not disclose standalone EML/DFB revenue.

companyProductCoverage.evidenceText: Cloud & Networking systems revenue was primarily driven by cloud transceiver product lines.
companyProductCoverage.notes: The report does not disclose standalone silicon photonic pluggable module revenue.

productGrowthInputs.attributionEvidenceText: Components revenue is the disclosed category that contains laser-related cloud and networking components.
productGrowthInputs.notes: Use components revenue growth as the closest disclosed scope for CW laser contribution.

productGrowthInputs.attributionEvidenceText: Systems revenue growth was primarily driven by cloud transceiver product lines.
productGrowthInputs.notes: The systems category is not split by transceiver technology; do not label it as silicon photonic without explicit disclosure.

productGrowthInputs.attributionEvidenceText: Components revenue is the disclosed category that contains laser-related cloud and networking components.
productGrowthInputs.notes: Cloud & Networking components 增长作为 EML/DFB 发射激光芯片的宽口径 proxy；未披露 EML/DFB 单项收入。

productGrowthInputs.attributionEvidenceText: Systems revenue growth was primarily driven by cloud transceiver product lines.
productGrowthInputs.notes: Cloud transceiver product lines 增长作为 AI 服务器高速光互连需求的宽口径 proxy；未披露 AI 服务器单项收入。

timelineEvents.title: Lumentum 发布 FY2026 Q3 Form 10-Q
timelineEvents.summary: FY2026Q3 收入 8.084 亿美元；components 收入同比约 +77.3%，systems 收入同比约 +121.1%。

notes.summary: Lumentum 披露 Cloud & Networking components 和 systems 两个产品大类收入及增长；未拆分 CW、EML 或硅光模块单项收入。
mappingAssumptions: Cloud & Networking components 用于 cw_light_source -> silicon_photonic_engine 的增长 proxy。
Cloud & Networking systems 用于 eml_pluggable_module -> data_center_switch 的增长 proxy。
Cloud & Networking components 用于 eml_laser_chip -> eml_transmit_engine 的增长 proxy。
Cloud & Networking systems 用于 eml_pluggable_module -> ai_server 的增长 proxy。
limitations: Components 是宽口径分类，包含多种光器件。
Systems 是宽口径分类，未拆分不同可插拔模块技术路线。
